results.name: huawei-lin/VTBench
results.description: This repository provides the official implementation of VTBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate the performance of visual tokenizers (VTs) in the context of autoregressive (AR) image generation.

results.name: jgravelle/mcp-retrieval-spec
results.description: jMRI v1.0 — open specification for token-efficient context retrieval in MCP servers. SDKs, reference server, benchmark.

results.name: dub-flow/sessionprobe
results.description: SessionProbe is a multi-threaded tool designed for penetration testing and bug bounty hunting. It evaluates user privileges in web applications by taking a session token and checking access across a list of URLs, highlighting potential authorization issues.

results.name: OpenBMB/InfiniteBench
results.description: Codes for the paper "∞Bench: Extending Long Context Evaluation Beyond 100K Tokens": https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.13718

results.name: sgl-project/genai-bench
results.description: Genai-bench is a powerful benchmark tool designed for comprehensive token-level performance evaluation of large language model (LLM) serving systems.

results.name: yueliu1999/Awesome-Efficient-Inference-for-LRMs
results.description: Awesome-Efficient-Inference-for-LRMs is a collection of state-of-the-art, novel, exciting, token-efficient methods for Large Reasoning Models (LRMs). It contains papers, codes, datasets, evaluations, and analyses. https://arxiv.org/pdf/2503.23077

results.name: davidsbatista/NER-Evaluation
results.description: An implementation of a full named-entity evaluation metrics based on SemEval'13 Task 9 - not at tag/token level but considering all the tokens that are part of the named-entity

results.name: MantisAI/nervaluate
results.description: Full named-entity (i.e., not tag/token) evaluation metrics based on SemEval’13

results.name: DavidGrangier/wikipedia-biography-dataset
results.description: This dataset gathers 728,321 biographies from wikipedia. It aims at evaluating text generation algorithms. For each article, we provide the first paragraph and the infobox (both tokenized).

results.description: A Video Tokenizer Evaluation Dataset

results.description: Image and video Tokenizer/VAE selection guide, text and face reconstruction evaluation.

results.description: PyTorch codes for "Iterative Token Evaluation and Refinement for Real-World Super-Resolution", AAAI 2024

results.name: KatarinaYuan/StructTokenBench
results.description: A benchmark for comprehensive evaluation on protein structure tokenization methods

results.name: bobmatnyc/ai-code-review
results.description: AI-powered code review CLI with multiple providers (Gemini, Claude, OpenAI). Features 95%+ token reduction via semantic chunking, 7 review types (security/performance/evaluation), multi-language support, interactive fixes, and developer skill assessment.

results.name: golsun/NLP-tools
results.description: Useful python NLP tools (evaluation, GUI interface, tokenization)
